brand_profile.mission_statement: Democratize AI-powered business intelligence for enterprises

pains.pain: Fragmented data sources require manual reconciliation
pains.rationale: Operators report 40% of time spent on data pipelines

pains.pain: Lack of real-time insights on business metrics
High cost of maintaining custom ETL pipelines
pains.rationale: Engineering resource allocation directly tied to pipeline maintenance

needs.need: Unified data platform with minimal setup
needs.rationale: Quick time-to-value is critical for budget justification
Business outcomes depend on up-to-date information availability

expectations.rationale: Switching costs are prohibitive for established teams

desired_outcomes: Achieve real-time insights dashboard within 2 weeks

pains.pain: Difficulty securing executive sponsorship for analytics
pains.rationale: Hard to justify ROI when data initiatives fail

needs.rationale: Budget constraints mean no enterprise-tier spending

expectations.expectation: Onboarding completed in under 1 week without external help
expectations.rationale: Minimal support availability in startup environments

desired_outcomes: Enable data-driven decision making with minimal setup
Demonstrate quick wins to secure budget

pains.rationale: Close takes 5-10 days, manual error-prone process

needs.rationale: Accelerate close cycles and improve accuracy

expectations.expectation: Compliance with SOX audits and GAAP standards

desired_outcomes: Close financials in 2 days vs 10 days
